name: Passover Nut Torte
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend the egg yolks and sugar until smooth.
2. Add matzoh meal, baking powder, vanilla extract, and ground almonds to the egg yolk mixture. Mix until well combined.
3. Beat the egg whites with a pinch of salt until they form stiff peaks.
4. Gently fold the beaten egg whites into the nut-matzoh mixture using a spatula, ensuring not to deflate the batter.
5. Pour the batter into a greased 8-inch springform pan and spread evenly.
6. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
7. Bake for 40-50 minutes or until set and golden brown on top.
8. Turn the cooled torte upside down onto a plate.
9. Serve plain or with strawberries and whipped cream, if desired.
